_comment: sovereign-os MS022 SSE subscriber quota dashboard. Visualizes the selfdef-side selfdef_sse_subscribers_* gauges shipped via crates/selfdef-api/src/sse_quota_metrics.rs (selfdef commit 77b4499). Pairs with the 3 alert rules in config/prometheus/alerts/ms022-sse-quota.rules.yml and the runbook sections in docs/operator/m060-deployment-guide.md (#### MS022Sse{GlobalQuotaApproaching,GlobalQuotaSaturated,PerTokenQuotaSaturated}). Operator imports into Grafana via Settings → JSON Model. Project boundary R10212: pure observability — no mutation surface.

panels.title: global saturation (0..1)
panels.description: Live ratio active/cap. Yellow >0.5, red >0.85 (matches MS022SseGlobalQuotaApproaching alert threshold).

panels.title: global active
panels.description: Current live SSE subscribers across all tokens.

panels.title: global cap
panels.description: Effective global cap (operator override or compiled default 64). The threshold MS022SseGlobalQuotaSaturated fires against.

panels.title: tokens saturated
panels.description: Tokens currently at-or-above the per-token cap. The MS022SsePerTokenQuotaSaturated alert fires when this > 0 for 5m.

panels.title: global saturation over time
panels.description: Saturation trend. Alert rules fire on the 0.85 (warning) and 1.0 (critical) horizontal lines.

panels.title: global active vs cap
panels.description: Raw subscriber count alongside the cap line. The gap is the available headroom.

panels.title: per-token subscriber counts (top 20)
panels.description: Live per-token state. Sorted by subscriber count desc so the operator immediately sees which token_fp is dominant. The 8-hex token_fp matches the privacy-preserving prefix selfdefd emits in its tracing output.

panels.title: per-token saturated count over time
panels.description: How many distinct tokens are at-or-above the per-token cap. A sustained > 0 line fires MS022SsePerTokenQuotaSaturated.

panels.title: per-token cap over time
panels.description: Operator-tunable [api].max_sse_subscribers_per_token. Step changes here track config edits + daemon restarts.

panels.title: companion: M060 chain-health rate (cross-context)
panels.description: Companion view of the existing chain-wide M060 alert metric so operators see if SSE quota events correlate with chain-wide events.

title: sovereign-os — MS022 SSE subscriber quota
